'''Moreem Espara''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Hapan]] [[Major/Legends|Major]] in the [[Hapan Royal Guard]]. She was sent by [[Queen Mother]] [[Tenel Ka Djo|Tenel Ka]] to serve as [[Darth Caedus|Jacen Solo's]] command liaison and advisor onboard the [[Anakin Solo (starship)|''Anakin Solo'']] when he went to arrest [[Ducha]] [[AlGray]]. Later, Jacen would [[Telekinesis/Legends#Choking Powers|Force choke]] her when she questioned his orders. She was released from the choke after Jacen thought he made his point. Espara escorted [[Allana Djo Solo|Allana]] back to [[Hapes/Legends|Hapes]] after the defeat of Hapan Heritage Council. After the [[Duel in the Royal Hangar|brief duel]] between [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|Leia Organa Solo]] and [[Tahiri Veila]] on Hapes, she escorted Tahiri back to her [[StealthX]] and had her cloaking unit removed to ensure she didn't sneak back to Hapes on the orders of the Queen Mother, after making those suggestions personally.
